package.name: manus_dg5f_sota_retarget_a
package.description: SOTA-retargeting "A" base: Manus glove (leader) -> Tesollo DG5F (follower) via kinematic optimization with the comprehensive objective from "Analyzing Key Objectives in Human-to-Robot Retargeting for Dexterous Manipulation" (arXiv 2506.09384): thumb fingertip position, wrist-to- fingertip vectors, sigmoid-switched pinch distance, fingertip orientation (DIP -> tip), joint + velocity regularization. Solved with scipy SLSQP against the DG5F URDF (parsed in-node, pure Python FK).
